question: The chart shows browser usage share by product. Which statement is supported by the chart data?

options.A: Chrome has the largest market share among the categories shown.
options.B: Edge has the largest market share among the categories shown.
options.C: Firefox has a larger share than Chrome.
options.D: Others accounts for more than 20% of usage.

explanation: From the labels, Edge has the highest share (26%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Chrome is largest when relying on visual comparison.
